events.reasoning: Proceeding
Starting WATCHER A0
Talking to Neow to see blessing options

events.translated: [ Lose 7 Max HP Choose a rare Card to obtain ]
events.reasoning: Lose 7 Max HP to choose a rare card - a guaranteed rare pick can define the run, and 65 Max HP is manageable at A0
Judgment is an excellent finisher - instant kill at 30HP (40 upgraded). Synergizes with setup-then-burst paradigm and is great against Slime Boss split slimes
Leaving Neow to start the run
Starting at x=2 for route: Monster->Unknown->Monster->Shop->Monster->Elite->Unknown->Rest->Treasure->Elite. Two elites with good rest/shop coverage.

events.command: play Miracle; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Miracle → Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Cultist buffs turn 1, no incoming damage. Play Miracle for energy, 3 Strikes = 18 damage. Cultist at 30 HP, Judgment kills next turn.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Block 10 vs 6 incoming = zero damage. Strike chips 6 damage, Cultist at 24. Next turn reshuffle includes Judgment for the kill.
Block 13 vs 9 incoming = zero damage. Enter Calm for +2E next turn. Next turn draw has Eruption+Judgment for burst kill.

events.translated: Eruption → Cultist → Judgment → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: BURST TURN: Eruption from Calm (+2E, enter Wrath, 9 dmg). Cultist at 15 HP. Judgment kills at <=30 HP. Clean 4-turn kill, zero damage taken.
Looking at card reward options
Inner Peace is a Wrath exit AND draw engine. In Calm it draws 2, in Wrath it enters Calm. Critical for the one-shot paradigm safety and card draw.
Moving to next floor
Following planned route: Unknown at x=2. Connects to F3 Monster(x=1) which leads to Shop at F4.

events.command: play Miracle; play Vigilance; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Miracle → Vigilance → Defend → Strike → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: Block 13 vs ~10 incoming = zero damage. Enter Calm for +2E next turn. Strike triggers Curl Up 3 on Louse 0, dealing 3 effective. Setup for burst next turn.
Inner Peace draws 3 in Calm. Must play draw cards first and re-evaluate.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Judgment 0; play Strike 1; end
events.translated: Eruption → Louse → Judgment → Louse → Strike → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: BURST KILL: Eruption on Louse 1 (9-5 Curl Up=4 effective, 8 HP remaining). Enter Wrath. Judgment kills Louse 0 (5<=30). Strike on Louse 1 (12 in Wrath, kills 8 HP). Both die, zero damage taken.
Checking card reward options
Crescendo gives a second Wrath entry and exhausts (deck thinning). With Inner Peace as exit and Eruption as primary entry, this adds flexibility without permanent deck dilution.
Moving to map for next floor
Monster at x=1. On planned route, connects to Shop/Unknown/Monster at F4.

events.command: play Miracle; play Vigilance; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Miracle → Vigilance → Defend → Strike → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: Jaw Worm Turn 1: likely Chomp (11 dmg). Miracle+Vigilance+Defend = 13 block = zero damage. Strike deals 6 to chip. Enter Calm for +2E next turn.
Draw 3 cards in Calm (2 Strikes + Eruption). Must play draw cards first and re-evaluate.

events.command: play Crescendo; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Crescendo → Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: FREE TURN (Bellow). Crescendo from Calm: +2E enter Wrath. 3 Strikes at 12 each = 36 dmg - 6 block = 30 effective. Jaw Worm to 6 HP. Judgment kills next turn.
Take Skill Potion for later use
Check card reward options
Check card reward options
Bowling Bash is excellent against Slime Boss (Act 1 boss). Deals 7 per enemy, scaling with enemy count. In Wrath with split slimes, deals massive AOE damage for 1E.
Moving to map
Shop at F4. Can remove a Strike for deck thinning or buy useful cards/relics. 139 gold available.
Waiting for shop to load
Try to open the shop interface
Click on shop to enter it
Click center of screen to enter shop
Attempting to interact with shop inventory
Battle Hymn is a key Power - generates Smite (12 dmg) each turn. Excellent for sustained boss damage against Slime Boss. 70g leaves 69g for future use.
Done shopping. Saving 69g for future card removal or better cards.
Leaving shop, moving to next floor
Monster at F5, then Elite at F6. Still at full HP, deck is growing. Good route to pick up an elite relic.

events.command: play Miracle; play Battle Hymn; play Inner Peace; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Miracle → Battle Hymn → Inner Peace → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup turn: Battle Hymn Power online (Smite generation every turn). Inner Peace enters Calm (+2E next turn). 2 Defends = 10 block against possible attack. All pieces set up for burst next turn.

events.command: play Crescendo; play Smite 0; play Bowling Bash 0; play Judgment 0; end
events.translated: Crescendo → Smite → Slaver → Bowling Bash → Slaver → Judgment → Slaver → End Turn
events.reasoning: BURST KILL: Crescendo from Calm (+2E, Wrath). Smite (24 in Wrath) + Bowling Bash (14 in Wrath) = 38. Slaver at 8 HP. Judgment kills (8<=30). Clean 2-turn kill.
Take Swift Potion (Draw 3) - useful for burst turns
Check card reward options
Consecrate is free AOE (0E, 5 dmg all). In Wrath = 10 to all. Excellent for Slime Boss split. Never competes for energy.
Moving to map
Take the Elite at F6. At 96% HP with good deck and 2 potions. Need elite relics for the run. Rest is available at F8 after.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Lagavulin
FIGHT TYPE: Elite (spend HP to kill fast, but minimize waste)
WIN CONDITION: Burst through 109 HP + 8 block/turn from Metallicize. Must kill before debuffs stack (-1 Str/-1 Dex every 3 turns once awake).
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Lagavulin sleeps for 3 turns (no attack). Wakes on turn 4 with 18 damage attack. Use free turns to deal maximum damage and set up.
KEY CARDS: Battle Hymn (sustained Smite generation), Eruption (Wrath entry), Bowling Bash (single target only 7), Judgment (finisher at <=30), Consecrate (free 5 damage)
POTION PLAN: Save potions unless needed. Swift Potion for draw on burst turn.
RISKS: Metallicize 8 = must deal 8+ per turn to make progress. Long fight = more debuffs. Need burst, not chip.

TURN 1 PLAN: Lagavulin asleep (no damage incoming). Free turn to set up.
- Play Battle Hymn first if drawn (not in hand yet)
- Miracle (+1E = 4E). Consecrate (0E, 5 dmg through 8 block = nope, but chips block). 
- Actually Consecrate deals 5 to all enemies - but Lagavulin has 8 block, so 5 damage absorbed by block. Block goes to 3.
- Eruption (2E, 9 dmg vs 3 remaining block = 6 to HP). Enter Wrath.
- Strike (1E, 12 in Wrath vs 0 block = 12 to HP).
- Or skip Wrath and just chip. Wait, I need to deal damage while Lagavulin sleeps.

Wait - does attacking Lagavulin wake it up? Let me check.
Actually, Lagavulin wakes up if you attack it OR after 3 turns. If I attack turn 1, it wakes up immediately.

This changes everything. If I attack, it wakes up and starts debuffing. If I DON'T attack, I get 3 free turns to set up Battle Hymn, draw cards, build block.

REVISED PLAN: Do NOT attack Lagavulin for first 3 turns. Use them to:
Turn 1: Play Battle Hymn (Power), enter Calm with Vigilance, set up.
Turn 2-3: Draw, accumulate Smites, set up for burst.
Turn 4+: It wakes. Burst in Wrath to deal massive damage.

Actually wait - I should verify: will Lagavulin wake if I play Consecrate? Consecrate is an attack that hits all enemies. Yes, it would wake it. Don't play attacks.

TURN 1: Miracle (0E), Battle Hymn is NOT in hand. Vigilance (2E, enter Calm). Defend (1E, unnecessary but nothing else to do with energy).
Problem: Battle Hymn is in draw pile. I need it ASAP. Inner Peace is also in draw pile.

Actually, should I just attack? If I burst in Wrath I can deal ~30+ damage turn 1. And then continuing to deal damage while it attacks. Lagavulin has 109 HP and 8 Metallicize. Thats tough.

Let me just setup. Not attacking = 3 free turns to play Battle Hymn and build Smites.

events.command: play Miracle; play Consecrate 0; play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Miracle → Consecrate → Lagavulin → Eruption → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Wake Lagavulin: Consecrate chips 5 off 8 block. Eruption deals 6 HP damage through remaining 3 block, wakes it (stunned next turn), enters Wrath. Metallicize removed. Strike deals 12 in Wrath. Total 18 HP damage. Lagavulin stunned, safe to end in Wrath.
Swift Potion draws 3. Draw pile has Inner Peace (Calm entry, exits Wrath), 3 Defends, Battle Hymn, Strike. Need to find a way to block 36 incoming or exit Wrath.
Skill Potion for random Watcher skill. Need block or Wrath exit to survive 36 incoming.
Choose first skill option from Skill Potion

events.command: play Empty Body; play Bowling Bash 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Empty Body → Bowling Bash → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Empty Body exits Wrath (0E, 7 block) - reduces incoming from 36 to 18. Then Bowling Bash (7) + 2 Strikes (12) = 19 damage. Take 11 damage (18-7). Lagavulin at 72, me at 52. Maximizing damage output while surviving.

events.command: play Battle Hymn; play Inner Peace; play Defend; end
events.translated: Battle Hymn → Inner Peace → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup Battle Hymn (Smite generation every turn). Inner Peace enters Calm (+2E next turn). Defend for 5 block. Take 13 damage (18-5). At 39 HP. Next turn: Calm exit burst with Smites.

events.command: play Crescendo; play Smite 0; play Strike 0; play Eruption 0; end
events.translated: Crescendo → Smite → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → Eruption → Lagavulin → End Turn
events.reasoning: BURST on free Siphon Soul turn: Crescendo from Calm (Wrath, +2E, 5E total). Smite (24) + Strike (12) + Eruption (9-18) = 45-54 damage. Lagavulin to 18-27 HP. Next turn Judgment kills. Draw pile has Empty Body/Vigilance for Wrath exit next turn.
Kill Lagavulin: Smite = (12-1Str)*2 Wrath = 22 damage vs 18 HP. Confirmed kill.

DEAD BRANCH! Best relic in the game. Generates random cards on exhaust. Incredible with Smite (from Battle Hymn, exhausts every play), Crescendo (exhausts), and any exhaust effects. This defines the run.
Check card reward
Second Crescendo - more Wrath entries AND each play triggers Dead Branch (exhaust = random card). More exhaust = more value from Dead Branch.
Done with rewards, moving to map
Unknown at F7. At 60% HP, manageable. Connects to Rest at F8 for recovery before continuing.
Disagree. Shop is 5 floors away at F12, too far to carry Doubt curse. Doubt wastes a hand slot and applies Weak every turn. With Dead Branch, keeping the deck clean is important.
Leave the event
Rest at F8. At 39/65 (60%), need to heal before upcoming fights. Connects to Treasure then potential Elite at F10.
Heal ~19 HP (39→58). Need HP for upcoming fights. Will upgrade Eruption at F15 rest site before boss.
Moving to map
Treasure chest at F9. Free relic. Then can route to Elite at F10 for second elite relic.
White Beast Statue (upgraded potions). Taking the relic over Sapphire Key - need to focus on winning, not the Heart fight.
Done with treasure, moving on
Monster at F10. Only option. At 89% HP with Dead Branch, deck is strong.
Miracle exhausts = Dead Branch trigger (random card). Play first to see what we get before committing energy.

events.command: play Master Reality; play Eruption 0; play Judgment 0; end
events.translated: Master Reality → Eruption → Louse → Judgment → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: Master Reality (1E, upgrades all created cards - massive synergy with Dead Branch + Battle Hymn). Eruption on Louse (2E, triggers Curl Up, 2 HP damage, enter Wrath). Judgment kills Louse (13 HP <=30). Cultist only buffs = safe in Wrath.
EXIT WRATH via Vigilance (2E, Calm, 7 block). Defend (1E, 4 block). Total 11 block vs 12 incoming = take 1 damage. Safe in Calm for +2E next turn burst.
Setup Battle Hymn Power - generates Smite+ each turn (upgraded by Master Reality). Critical setup before burst.
Crescendo from Calm: enter Wrath +2E, exhaust triggers Dead Branch (upgraded random card from Master Reality). 3E remaining.
Second Crescendo exhaust = another Dead Branch trigger (upgraded card). Already in Wrath. 2E remaining.

events.command: play Empty Body+; play Defend; play Consecrate 1; end
events.translated: Empty Body+ → Defend → Consecrate → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Exit Wrath with Empty Body+ (8 block) + Defend (4 block) = 12 block vs 9 incoming = zero damage. Consecrate chips 4 damage. Cultist at 49. Setup for burst next turn with Smite+ from Battle Hymn.
Smite+ deals 11 damage (12 base -1 Str). Exhaust triggers Dead Branch for upgraded random card. Need to see what we get before planning rest of turn.

events.translated: Strike → Cultist → Judgment → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: Strike deals 5 damage (Cultist to 27 HP). Judgment kills at <=30 HP. Clean kill, zero damage taken this fight (after Louse killed turn 1).
Take Swift Potion for burst turns
Check card reward
Sands of Time: 20 damage with built-in Retain. Gets 1E cheaper each turn retained. After 4 turns, its FREE. In Wrath = 40 damage for 0E. Perfect for setup-burst paradigm.
Moving to map
Monster at F11. Only option. Strong deck at 89% HP.
Miracle exhaust triggers Dead Branch (upgraded random card). +1E. Evaluate before spending energy.

events.command: play Fear No Evil 0; play Defend; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Fear No Evil → Slaver → Defend → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Fear No Evil+ (10 dmg, enter Calm since enemy attacks). Defend (4 block) + Vigilance (7 block in Calm) = 11 block vs 13 incoming = take 2. Slaver at 38. Calm setup for burst kill next turn.

events.command: play Defend; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Strike → Slaver → Strike → Slaver → End Turn
events.reasoning: Defend (4 block vs 8 incoming = take 4). 2 Strikes (10 damage, Slaver to 30). Next turn Judgment kills at <=30. Efficient 3-turn kill.
Crescendo from Calm: Wrath +2E, exhaust → Dead Branch trigger. Free turn (enemy debuffing). 4E remaining.
Second Crescendo: already in Wrath, exhaust → Dead Branch trigger. 3E remaining.
Wreath of Flame: +8 damage to next attack (upgraded by Master Reality). In Wrath, this amplifies the doubled attack damage.
Talk to the Hand+ in Wrath with Wreath of Flame. Exhaust → Dead Branch trigger. Deals amplified damage.
Strike in Wrath: 10 damage vs 8 HP. Kill confirmed.
Fear Potion (3 Vulnerable). Useful for elite/boss burst.
Check card reward
Skip. Deck is 16 cards, keeping it lean. Dead Branch generates cards in combat. None of these are essential.
Moving to map
Monster at F12. On route to boss. 4 more floors to boss with rest at F15.
Miracle exhaust → Dead Branch trigger +1E = 4E. Evaluate new card before planning.

events.translated: Judgment → Fungi Beast → Strike → Fungi Beast → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Judgment kills Beast 0 (24<=30). Strike deals 5 to Beast 1 (to 19). Vigilance enters Calm (8 block, safe). Beast 1 is buffing = 0 incoming. In Calm for +2E next turn. Spore Cloud gives 2 Vulnerable but Beast 1 doesnt attack this turn.
Inner Peace draws 3 in Calm. Need Wrath entry or more attacks to kill Beast 1 (18 HP). Draw from pile has Crescendos, Eruption, Consecrate.

events.command: play Crescendo; play Strike 1; play Strike 1; end

events.reasoning: Crescendo from Calm: +2E, enter Wrath, exhaust → Dead Branch. 2 Strikes in Wrath = 20 damage vs 18 HP. Kill confirmed. Beast dies before attacking.

Strike in Wrath: 12 damage vs 6 HP. Kill confirmed.
Essence of Steel (4 Metallicize, passive block). Good for boss.
Check card reward
Skip. Deck is lean at 16 cards. Dead Branch generates cards in combat. None of these significantly improve the deck.
Moving to map
Unknown at F13. Could be event with useful benefit. Then Monster at F14, Rest at F15, Boss.
Mercury Hourglass: 3 passive AOE damage per turn. Free chip damage while setting up in Calm. Great for multi-enemy fights and Slime Boss split. No need for Sapphire Key.
Moving on
Monster at F14 (x=2). Leads to Rest at F15 before Slime Boss.
Miracle exhaust → Dead Branch trigger + energy. Evaluate new card.
Consecrate (0E, 4 damage to Looter). Free chip before draw card.

events.command: play Inner Peace; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Inner Peace → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Inner Peace enters Calm. 2 Defends = 8 block vs 10 incoming = take 2. In Calm for +2E burst next turn. Looter at 32, Judgment kills next turn (32>30 so need chip first, or burst in Wrath).
Judgment: Looter at 29 HP <= 30. Instant kill! Enemy dies before attacking.
Check card reward
Skip. Deck is lean, none of these add significant value. Dead Branch covers card generation.
Moving to rest site before boss
Rest site before Slime Boss. Upgrade Eruption to 1E - highest priority Watcher upgrade.
Upgrade Eruption from 2E to 1E. This is the #1 priority Watcher upgrade - makes the Calm-Wrath cycle net positive energy. Entering boss at 55 HP is fine with our strong deck.
Upgrade Eruption: 2E -> 1E. Highest priority Watcher upgrade.
Confirm upgrade
Moving to Slime Boss fight
Only path leads to Slime Boss

FIGHT STRATEGY - Slime Boss
FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely to kill faster)
WIN CONDITION: Deal 140+ total damage. Key phases:
  Phase 1: Damage Slime Boss to ~70 HP to trigger split
  Phase 2: Kill the 2 large slimes (65 HP each)
  
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Not mandatory (boss fight), but minimize when possible.
  
KEY CARDS: 
  - Judgment (instant kill at <=30 HP on each slime)
  - Bowling Bash (7 per enemy, scales with enemy count, 14+ per enemy in Wrath)
  - Consecrate (free 5 AOE, 10 in Wrath)
  - Battle Hymn (Smites + Dead Branch triggers)
  - Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry from Calm)
  - Dead Branch (generates cards on every exhaust)
  - Mercury Hourglass (3 AOE per turn passive)

POTION PLAN: 
  - Essence of Steel (4 Metallicize) for sustained block during split phase
  - Fear Potion (3 Vulnerable) on boss or on split slimes
  - Swift Potion (draw 3) for burst turns

STRATEGY:
  Turn 1 (STRONG_DEBUFF = free turn): Setup Battle Hymn, enter Calm, deal damage
  Pre-split: Deal ~67 damage to get Boss to 70 HP. Miracle exhaust = Dead Branch trigger each fight.
  Split: Boss creates 2 Large Slimes (~65 HP each). Bowling Bash + Consecrate for AOE.
  Post-split: Use Judgment to finish slimes at <=30 HP. Bowling Bash in Wrath devastating here.
  
RISKS:
  - Slimed cards clogging draws (mitigated by 18-card deck diluting impact)
  - Ending in Wrath vs attacking slimes
  - Running out of Wrath exits
  
CURRENT HAND: Miracle, 2x Strike, Judgment, 2x Defend
Turn 1 (free turn - STRONG_DEBUFF):
  Miracle (0E, exhaust -> Dead Branch + 1E = 4E)
  Then maximize setup and damage. No incoming damage.

Miracle exhaust -> Dead Branch trigger + 1E. Free debuff turn, maximize setup.

events.translated: Talk to the Hand → Slime Boss
events.reasoning: Talk to the Hand: damage + Block Return + exhaust -> Dead Branch trigger. Free turn, maximize value.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Slime Boss → Strike → Slime Boss → Strike → Slime Boss → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn. 3 Strikes for 15 damage. Wait - I have 2 Strikes and Judgment. Let me do 2 Strikes + save 1E. Actually Strikes deal 5 each due to -1 Str. Hmm, I have 3E and 2 Strikes. 2 Strikes (2E, 10 damage) + Wave of the Hand or Defend.

events.command: play Wave of the Hand; end
events.translated: Wave of the Hand → End Turn
events.reasoning: Wave of the Hand: apply Weak whenever I gain block. With Block Return 2, every attack triggers Weak. Great sustained defense setup. Free turn, no incoming damage.
Essence of Steel: 4 Metallicize = 4 passive block every turn for rest of combat. Huge sustained value in a boss fight.

events.command: play Battle Hymn; play Inner Peace; play Defend; end
events.translated: Battle Hymn → Inner Peace → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Battle Hymn Power active (Smite+ generation). Inner Peace enters Calm (+2E next turn for burst). Defend + 4 Metallicize = 9 block. Stay safe, setup for burst next turn.
Crescendo from Calm: +2E, enter Wrath, exhaust -> Dead Branch. 4E remaining. Must plan Wrath exit before ending turn.
Consecrate: 10 damage in Wrath (free, 0E). Block Return gives 2 block.
Flurry of Blows: 8 damage in Wrath (free, 0E). Will return on stance change. +2 Block Return.
Smite: 24 damage in Wrath (1E). Exhaust triggers Dead Branch. +2 Block Return.
EXIT WRATH: Vigilance (2E, 8 block, Calm) + Defend (1E, 5 block). Total block: 6+8+5+4(Plated)=23 vs 35=take 12. In Calm for +2E next turn. Boss at 72, almost at split threshold.
Flurry (0E, 4 damage + 2 Block Return = 16 block total).
Defend (1E, 5 block = 21 block total). Then Plated 4 at end = 25 vs 35 incoming.
End turn. 25 block vs 35 = take 10 damage. Manageable.
Fear Potion: 3 Vulnerable on Acid Slime. Enables one-turn kill in Wrath.
Crescendo from Calm: Wrath +2E, exhaust -> Dead Branch. 4E remaining.
Smite on Acid Slime (Vulnerable): 12*2*1.5=36 damage. Exhaust -> Dead Branch.
Bowling Bash on Acid Slime (Vulnerable): 14*2*1.5=42 vs 29 HP. Kill confirmed.

events.command: play Inner Peace; play Defend; end
events.reasoning: Exit Wrath via Inner Peace (Calm). Defend for 5 block + 4 Plated = 9 vs 16 incoming = take 7. In Calm for burst next turn. Spike Slime at 65 HP.
Smite: 12 damage, exhaust -> Dead Branch trigger. Free debuff turn.

events.translated: Consecrate → Spike Slime (L) → Strike → Spike Slime (L) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free debuff turn. Consecrate (5 dmg) + Strike (6 dmg) = 11 damage. Slime to 39. Sands of Time retained (3->2E next turn). Mercury Hourglass + next turn burst should finish it.
Slimed costs 1E but exhausts -> Dead Branch trigger. Free turn, worth the energy for potential attack card.

events.translated: Sands of Time → Spike Slime (L) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Sands of Time: 20 damage for 2E. Slime to 16 HP. Next turn Mercury Hourglass (3) + any attack kills. Judgment will finish at <=30.

events.command: play Eruption+ 0; play Smite 2; play Flurry of Blows 0; end
events.translated: Eruption+ → Spike Slime (M) → Smite → Spike Slime (M) → Flurry of Blows → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: KILL BOTH: Eruption+ on Slime 0 (9 dmg, enter Wrath, to 4 HP). Smite on Slime 2 (24 in Wrath, kills 13 HP). Flurry on Slime 0 (8 in Wrath, kills 4 HP). BOSS DEFEATED!
Flurry of Blows: 8 damage in Wrath vs 4 HP. Kill confirmed. SLIME BOSS DEFEATED!
Take Flex Potion
Check card reward
Vault: Take an additional turn! Incredibly powerful. Exhaust triggers Dead Branch. At 3E its expensive but an extra turn is unmatched value.
Moving to Act 2 boss relic selection

Busted Crown: deck engine is assembled (Dead Branch + Master Reality + Battle Hymn + stance cycling). We only need specific upgrades and maybe 1-2 targeted cards. Fewer card options is minimal downside when we are already skipping most rewards.
Boss chest already opened, proceeding
Act 2 path: x=6 route gives monsters -> rest -> elite -> treasure -> shop -> rest -> boss. Good balance of fights, 1 elite, 2 rests, shop for 362g.
Free setup turn (enemy defending). Battle Hymn generates Smite each turn for sustained damage.
0E exhaust - generates 1 energy AND triggers Dead Branch for a random card.
AMAZING Dead Branch pull! Master Reality upgrades all created cards - Battle Hymn will now generate Smite+ (12 dmg) instead of Smite (5 dmg) every turn. Massive synergy.
Enter Calm for +2E next turn. Enemy is defending so no urgency. Will draw cards since entering Calm from no-stance.
Enemy defending, attacks are useless against 37 block with Barricade. End in Calm for +2E next turn.
12 damage to chip through the 59 block. Exhaust triggers Dead Branch for a random card.

Simmering Fury+ - what does it do? Need to look it up. It is a Watcher skill. At end of turn while in Calm, gain energy and draw cards at start of next turn. This is GREAT for setup turns. Also need to plan: Spheric Guardian has Barricade + 43 block + 20 HP = 63 effective HP. Need Wrath burst to get through. But 10 incoming this turn. Plan: play Simmering Fury+ (setup for next turn burst), Defend x2 (10 block = exactly blocks 10 incoming), and end in Calm. Next turn burst with Wrath.

events.label: Strategy

Plan: play Simmering Fury+ (setup for next turn burst), Defend x2 (10 block = exactly blocks 10 incoming), and end in Calm. Next turn burst with Wrath.
Block 5 of the 10 incoming damage. Need 2 Defends for zero damage.
Second Defend for 10 total block vs 10 incoming. Zero damage taken.
Auto-enter Wrath next turn + draw 3 extra cards. With Calm exit +2E, next turn will be 6E and 8 cards in hand in Wrath = massive burst turn to chew through 43 block + 20 HP.
0E remaining, 10 block vs 10 incoming = zero damage. Next turn: Wrath + 8 cards + 6E = burst turn.
0E AOE attack in Wrath = 8 damage. Start chipping the 40 block. Free card.
24 damage in Wrath (12 base * 2). Exhaust triggers Dead Branch. Block goes 30 -> 6.
14 damage in Wrath to 18 HP guardian. Should reduce to 4 HP.
12 damage in Wrath vs 4 HP = guaranteed kill. Spheric Guardian dies.
Take Essence of Steel potion for boss/elite use. Gives 4 Plated Armor.
Check card reward options.
Tranquility is redundant with Inner Peace and Vigilance already in deck. Skip to keep deck lean.
Collected potion, skipped card. Proceed to next floor.
Only path available. Monster at x=6, continuing planned route.
0E exhaust for +1E and Dead Branch trigger. Random card might give block or a useful play.
Free 0E chip damage. Reduces block on the parasite before I set up.
Enter Calm for +2E next turn. Setting up for burst.
Block 5 of 12 incoming.
10 block vs 12 incoming. Take 2 damage. Acceptable.
Remove the 6 remaining block so next turn attacks hit HP directly. 1E.
End in Calm. 10 block vs 12 incoming = 2 damage. Do NOT play Indignation (Wrath before hit = 24 damage). Next turn: Calm exit +2E for burst.

Shelled Parasite - 70 HP, Plated Armor 14 (gains 14 block each turn). Incoming 12 (6x2). At 63/65 HP. No Wrath exit in hand. Breaking the no-Wrath-without-exit rule is BAD. But this is a hallway fight with 70 HP enemy. I should try to kill fast. Compromise: enter Wrath, deal max damage, accept 19 damage (24 in Wrath - 5 Defend). Go to 44 HP. Next turn hopefully draw an exit or have enough damage to kill. Total damage in Wrath this turn: Eruption 9-18 + Bowling Bash 14 + Strike 12 = 35-44 vs 81 effective. Parasite at 37-46 HP after this turn. Next turn with Smite+ from Battle Hymn + whatever I draw, likely can finish. Alternative: stay in Calm, chip for 13 damage per turn, takes 5-6 turns, take 7 damage per turn = 35-42 damage total. Wrath burst for 2 turns taking 19 damage total is BETTER than 5 turns at 7/turn = 35 damage. Go aggressive.

Wrath burst for 2 turns taking 19 damage total is BETTER than 5 turns at 7/turn = 35 damage. Go aggressive.
Enter Wrath from Calm (+2E). Deal 9-18 damage. Going aggressive to kill in 2 turns rather than chip for 5+ turns.
14 damage in Wrath (7*2). Breaks 2 block + 12 HP damage. Parasite to 58 HP.
12 damage in Wrath (6*2). Parasite to 46 HP. Plated Armor reduced further.
5 block vs 24 incoming. Take 19 damage (63->44 HP). Still safe.
Save Judgment for when parasite is <=30 HP. Take 19 damage (63->44). Still in Wrath unfortunately - no exit available.

EMERGENCY: 72 incoming (36*2 Wrath). Need Vigilance from draw pile to exit Wrath. Swift Potion draws 3 from draw pile of 4 (Defend, Strike, Vault, Vigilance). 75% chance to draw Vigilance for Calm exit.
EMERGENCY: Use Swift Potion to draw 3 cards. Need Vigilance to exit Wrath before 72 incoming damage.
Already in Wrath so no effect, but exhaust triggers Dead Branch for a random card. May get something useful. 1E.
12 damage in Wrath. Breaks 9 block + 3 HP damage. Parasite to 43 HP. Play attacks in Wrath before exiting.
EXIT WRATH to Calm. 8 block. Must exit or take 72 damage (36*2). Take 28 damage (36-8). HP: 44->16.
0E, 8 block vs 18 incoming = 10 damage. HP 44->34. In Calm for +2E next turn.

KILL TURN. Parasite: 43 HP, 8 block = 51 effective. In Calm with 4E (+2E from exit = 6E). Plan: Eruption+ (1E, 9 dmg, enter Wrath) + Bowling Bash (1E, 14 in Wrath) + Sands of Time (3E, 40 in Wrath) = 9+14+40=63 vs 51. Kill by 12 margin. Cost: 1+1+3=5E of 6E available. CONFIRMED KILL.

events.label: Strategy
events.reasoning: KILL TURN. Parasite: 43 HP, 8 block = 51 effective. In Calm with 4E (+2E from exit = 6E). Plan: Eruption+ (1E, 9 dmg, enter Wrath) + Bowling Bash (1E, 14 in Wrath) + Sands of Time (3E, 40 in Wrath) = 9+14+40=63 vs 51. Kill by 12 margin. Cost: 1+1+3=5E of 6E available. CONFIRMED KILL.
KILL TURN: Enter Wrath from Calm (+2E). 9 damage breaks 8 block + 1 HP damage. 5E remaining for Bowling Bash + Sands of Time to finish.
14 damage in Wrath. Parasite 42->28 HP. Then Sands of Time for 40 = kill.
40 damage in Wrath (20*2) vs 28 HP = guaranteed kill. Overkill by 12.
Blessing of the Forge upgrades all cards in hand. Excellent for boss/elite. Fill empty potion slot.
Check card options.
Halt is weak. Keep deck lean.
Rewards collected. Proceed to map.
Only path available. Unknown room at x=5.
Continue to see Face Trader options.
Leave. At 34 HP with 2 fights before rest site. Cannot afford to lose 6 HP. 50/50 trade is too risky.
Leave event.
Monster is predictable. Unknown in Act 2 could be a fight anyway. 2 fights then rest site.
0E exhaust for +1E (5E total) and Dead Branch trigger.
Enter Calm for +2E next turn. 8 block against 21 incoming.
5 more block = 13 total vs 21 incoming. Take 8 damage.
In Calm: draw 3 cards. Might draw Defends for more block. Draw effect - will reassess after.
Free 0E damage. Malleable will give block but we need to start chipping.
Exhaust for Dead Branch trigger. Does not attack so does not trigger Malleable. Save attacks for Wrath burst next turn.
12 damage in Wrath. Must deal damage while in Wrath to set up next turn kill. No Wrath exit available.
0E after attack! 14 damage in Wrath (7*2). Free damage.
12 damage in Wrath. Last energy. Chip as much as possible before taking hit.
Essence of Steel gives Plated Armor 4. Will provide 4 block every turn for rest of combat. Critical at 5 HP.
Take 42-13=29 damage. HP: 34->5. Plated Armor 4 will help next turn. In Wrath still - dangerous but snake at 45 HP, close to kill range.
Exhaust for Dead Branch trigger. Already in Wrath. Need random card that could help kill this turn.
14 damage in Wrath. Free turn (no attack). Must deal damage to set up Judgment kill next turn.
12 damage in Wrath. Snake at 28 HP. Reduces to 16 or lower. Judgment can kill next turn.
Exit Wrath to Calm. At 9 HP cannot afford Wrath doubling on any attack. Snake at 19 HP - Judgment kills next turn.
No incoming damage (STRONG_DEBUFF). Snake at 19 HP. Mercury Hourglass + Judgment = kill next turn. Safe in Calm.
INSTANT KILL: Snake at 16 HP <= 30 threshold. Judgment sets HP to 0. Fight over.
Power Potion gives a random Power card. Could get Mental Fortress, Rushdown, etc. Fill empty slot.
Check card reward.
Halt is weak. Skip.
Move to next floor. Need rest ASAP at 9 HP.
Only path. Monster fight at 9 HP. Must play perfectly - zero damage or death.
0E exhaust for +1E and Dead Branch card. Need block card or something useful. At 9 HP vs 16 incoming.
CRITICAL: Need a Power that provides block. Mental Fortress (4 block per stance change) or Like Water (5 block in Calm) could save this run. Only chance for block at 9 HP.
Devotion: 3 Mantra/turn. Divinity (3x damage) every 4 turns. Best long-term power. None give immediate block unfortunately.

CRITICAL SURVIVAL CHECK: 9 HP vs 16 incoming (10+6). Must kill Fungi Beast (Judgment, 1E) to reduce to 10 incoming. Have ZERO block in hand. 10 > 9 = lethal by 1. Only hope: Dead Branch or some mechanic I am missing. Plan: Play Devotion (0E), Battle Hymn (1E), Judgment on Fungi (1E), then maximize damage/setup with remaining 3E. May die to the 10 from Parasite. Playing it out.

0E power (upgraded by Master Reality). 3 Mantra/turn toward Divinity. Free setup.
Power setup: Smite+ generation each turn. Need sustained damage for Parasite.
INSTANT KILL: Fungi Beast at 24 HP <= 30 threshold. Removes 6 incoming damage. Target index 1.
Enter Wrath for doubled damage. Going to die anyway from 15 incoming. May as well maximize damage on the Parasite.
14 damage in Wrath (7*2). Only 1 enemy so 7 per enemy * 1 * 2 = 14. Break remaining 2 block + 12 HP damage.
12 damage in Wrath. Parasite to ~47 HP. Going to die but dealing maximum damage.
0E, no block, 9 HP vs 30 incoming in Wrath. Lethal damage incoming.
